plans.description:

App:
Use the MyAirtel app.

plans.validity: No bundle — charges per MB from airtime
plans.description:
Stay connected even without a data bundle with Airtel's Pay As You Use (PAYU) plan.

When activated, Airtel charges ₦4.60 per MB directly from your airtime balance, keeping you online without any upfront bundle purchase.

Note: This is significantly more expensive than any regular data plan and is best reserved for emergencies when you need just a small amount of data quickly.

How to Activate:

Code:
Dial *400#

App:
Use the MyAirtel app.

plans.validity: 75GB valid for 1 day; 5GB monthly for 5 months
plans.description:
The biggest welcome reward in Nigerian telecom — 100GB free data just for downloading the Glo Café App.

New users who download and register on the Glo Café App receive 75GB of free data instantly, plus 5GB every month for the next 5 months — totalling 100GB at no cost.

Important notes:
- The 75GB instant bonus is valid for 1 day only and expires at midnight — activate when you're ready to use it.
- The 5GB monthly bonuses are credited over 5 months after registration.
- This offer is available to new Glo Café users only — existing users are not eligible.
- Data can be used for all internet activities.

How to Activate:

App:
Download the Glo Café App → Register your Glo number → Bonus data is credited automatically.

Check balance:
Dial *323#

Get 10% extra data on select plans when you buy through the Glo Café App.

When you purchase eligible data bundles through the Glo Café App, you automatically receive 10% bonus data on top of your plan at no extra cost.

Example: Buying the ₦1,000 monthly plan (normally 2.6GB) through the app gives you an extra 260MB, bringing your total to 2.86GB.

Bonus data shares the same validity as your purchased plan.

How to Activate:

App:
Open the Glo Café App → Buy Data → Select any eligible plan → 10% bonus is applied automatically.

Check balance:
Dial *323#

plans.validity: Applied on every recharge done through the app
plans.description:
Double your airtime — get 100% recharge bonus on every recharge done through the Glo Café App.

When you top up your Glo line using the Glo Café App, you receive 100% bonus on your recharge amount — meaning every naira you load gives you double the airtime value.

This bonus can be used for calls, SMS, and data subscriptions.

How to Activate:

App:
Open the Glo Café App → Recharge → Select amount → 100% bonus is automatically applied.

Check balance:
Dial *323#

Unlock exclusive high-volume, short-validity data bundles only available on the Glo Café App.

Glo offers special data bundles exclusively through the Glo Café App that are not accessible via USSD or any other channel. These are high-volume bundles designed for heavy one-day usage — ideal for large downloads, binge streaming, or intensive browsing sessions.

Note: The specific pricing and data volumes of these bundles are personalised and vary per user. Open the app to see what exclusive bundles are available on your line.

How to Activate:

App:
Open the Glo Café App → Data Plans → Look for 'Special Bundles' or 'App Only' section.

Check balance:
Dial *323#
